scripts.dev:electron:build: tsup electron/main.ts electron/bundled-claude.ts electron/auth-store.ts electron/auto-updater.ts electron/preload-setup.ts electron/setup-token-runner.ts --format cjs --out-dir out/electron --external electron --external electron-updater --external @lydell/node-pty --watch
scripts.dev:electron:run: wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron out/electron/main.js
scripts.build:electron: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preflight.ts electron/bundled-claude.ts electron/auth-store.ts electron/auto-updater.ts electron/preload-setup.ts electron/setup-token-runner.ts --format cjs --out-dir out/electron --external electron --external electron-updater --external @lydell/node-pty --minify
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.prepack:runtime: npm --prefix ../runtime/api-server run build && npm --prefix ../packages/browser-mcp run build && npm --prefix ../packages/claude-cli run install:bundle
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run prepack:runtime && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml
